latest_successful_runs_by_scenario.description: Latest successful active-scenario runs paginated with limit and offset.
latest_successful_runs_by_scenario.title: Latest Successful Runs By Scenario

CanonicalCountsRead.description: Current-generation canonical record counts for one bank.
CanonicalCountsRead.title: CanonicalCountsRead

CanonicalPositionFacetsRead.description:
Distinct position types and currencies over the current generation.

Powers the blotter's filter dropdowns and KPIs without paging the book.
CanonicalPositionFacetsRead.title: CanonicalPositionFacetsRead

CashflowHorizon.description: Supported forecast horizons in days (mirrors the ML service contract).
CashflowHorizon.title: CashflowHorizon

EmailFallbackInstructionsRead.description: Send-ready email fallback bundle (BG/FMD/2026/07 downtime workflow).
EmailFallbackInstructionsRead.title: EmailFallbackInstructionsRead

EntityMapping.description:
How one canonical entity is populated from source tables.

Table resolution (documented precedence, applied per candidate name):
exact match first, then case-insensitive, then normalized (strip
non-alphanumerics, lowercase). ``source_table`` and every alias are
resolved independently and all distinct matches are extracted, so one
mapping can serve a CSV file stem (``03_gl_accounts``), a workbook sheet
(``General_Ledger``), and several position sheets at once.

A ``fields`` value may be a list of source columns: the first listed
column that exists in the source row is used (even if its cell is empty),
which lets one mapping span sheets with diverging headers (for example
``balance`` from ``balance_ccy`` on loan sheets and ``notional_ccy`` on
letter-of-credit sheets).
EntityMapping.title: EntityMapping

ForecastAssumptionsUpdate.description: Full or partial assumption override; unset fields resolve from the preset.
ForecastAssumptionsUpdate.title: ForecastAssumptionsUpdate

FxRateViewRead.description:
The authoritative spot for one pair: ``rate`` quote units per 1 base.

``history`` is the trailing persisted spot series (ascending by business
date, capped) for sparkline rendering.
FxRateViewRead.title: FxRateViewRead

IngestionSourceSummaryRead.description: Per-source-system rollup of ingestion history for one bank.
IngestionSourceSummaryRead.title: IngestionSourceSummaryRead

IngestionUploadRead.description: A source file staged in the bank's temp tier, ready to ingest.
IngestionUploadRead.title: IngestionUploadRead

LineageWalkRead.description: The transformation chain for one lineage node, newest first.
LineageWalkRead.title: LineageWalkRead

MappingConfig.description:
Per-institution source-to-canonical translation rules.

This is the onboarding deliverable. It is stored versioned in
``mapping_configs`` and passed to ``SourceAdapter.translate`` verbatim, so
every translation is reproducible from the config version recorded on the
batch.
MappingConfig.title: MappingConfig

MarketDataAttributionRead.description: Provenance + freshness for one served view (mirrors SourceAttribution).
MarketDataAttributionRead.title: MarketDataAttributionRead

MarketDataConnectionCreate.description:
Onboard one vendor connection (§9.2 steps 1-7).

``credentials`` is required for vendor sources and forbidden for
``manual_upload`` (which authenticates nothing). ``schedule`` maps scope
category (or scope) names to ``PullFrequency`` names; omitted categories
fall back to their §9.2 step-6 defaults.
MarketDataConnectionCreate.title: MarketDataConnectionCreate

MarketDataConnectionRead.description:
One connection's bank-facing view. Never carries credential values —
only status, fingerprint, and expiry (§10.1/§12.3).
MarketDataConnectionRead.title: MarketDataConnectionRead

MarketDataConnectionUpdate.description:
Post-onboarding management (§9.3) and credential rotation (§10.4).

When ``credentials`` is present the new set is validated against the
vendor FIRST; only on success are the stored ciphertext, fingerprint, and
expiry swapped in one transaction. On failure nothing changes and the
bank-facing error is returned as a 422.
MarketDataConnectionUpdate.title: MarketDataConnectionUpdate

MarketDataUploadRead.description:
Summary of one manual market data upload.

Wraps the ingestion batch the pull produced: its terminal status, the
scopes persisted, canonical record count, and the operator-facing
warnings (row-level problems included) and errors.
MarketDataUploadRead.title: MarketDataUploadRead

MarketDataViewsRead.description: Everything the canonical store can answer for a bank at an as-of date.

as_of_date.title: Market Data Views As Of Date

MarketDataViewsRead.title: MarketDataViewsRead

PackageSubmitCreate.description: Channel selection for submitRegulatoryPackage; omitted -> registry default.
PackageSubmitCreate.title: PackageSubmitCreate

PositionFacetValueRead.description: One filterable value and how many current-generation rows carry it.
PositionFacetValueRead.title: PositionFacetValueRead

PushRecordsPage.description:
One page of records: canonical entities and/or reference datasets.

Keys are constrained to the canonical entity types and reference dataset
kinds; each value is a list of records whose field names follow the
documented contract (or the bank's API_PUSH mapping config).
PushRecordsPage.title: PushRecordsPage

QuotaSummaryRead.description: Current-month quota ledger for one vendor (§11.1).
QuotaSummaryRead.title: QuotaSummaryRead

ReferenceMapping.description:
How one reference dataset is captured from one source table.

Reference rows are not translated field-by-field: the mapped table's rows
are preserved as payload dicts (values stringified, dates ISO) under
``dataset_kind``. ``fields`` optionally restricts which source columns are
kept; empty keeps every column.
ReferenceMapping.title: ReferenceMapping

ScopeInfoRead.description:
One taxonomy scope with its category, default pull frequency, the
vendors whose catalogs serve it, and the per-pull quota impact (§9.2
step 4). ``quota_units`` is the largest per-pull estimate across the
supporting vendors (manual upload always contributes zero).
ScopeInfoRead.title: ScopeInfoRead

SubmissionPollRead.description:
One poll cycle: the regulator-side status, the recorded poll event,
and the package after any resulting transition.
SubmissionPollRead.title: SubmissionPollRead

TemenosBackfillRequest.description: Historical backfill: one pull per as-of date in the inclusive range.
TemenosBackfillRequest.title: TemenosBackfillRequest

TemenosConnectionCreate.description:
Onboard one Temenos core-banking connection.

``credentials`` is required (the shape depends on ``connection_mode``: OFS
wants username+password; IRIS/Open API want client_id+client_secret or an
api_key). ``domains`` are ``CoreBankingDomain`` names to enable; omitted
means every domain the mode catalog supports. ``schedule`` maps domain
category to a ``PullCadence`` name.
TemenosConnectionCreate.title: TemenosConnectionCreate

TemenosConnectionRead.description:
One connection's bank-facing view. Never carries credential values —
only status, fingerprint, and expiry.
TemenosConnectionRead.title: TemenosConnectionRead

TemenosConnectionUpdate.description:
Post-onboarding management and credential rotation.

When ``credentials`` is present the new set is validated FIRST; only on
success are the stored ciphertext, fingerprint, and expiry swapped in one
transaction. On failure nothing changes and the error is returned as a 422.
TemenosConnectionUpdate.title: TemenosConnectionUpdate

TemenosDomainInfoRead.description:
One core-banking domain with its category, canonical entity type, default
pull cadence, and whether the connection's mode catalog supports it.
TemenosDomainInfoRead.title: TemenosDomainInfoRead

TemenosPullTriggerRequest.description: On-demand pull for a single as-of date (defaults to today).
TemenosPullTriggerRequest.title: TemenosPullTriggerRequest

TemenosTestPullRead.description:
Result of a connection test: a human-readable summary of what a pull
would fetch on success, a bank-facing error otherwise.
TemenosTestPullRead.title: TemenosTestPullRead

TestPullRead.description:
Result of the §9.2 step-5 representative test pull: human-readable
sample values on success, a bank-facing error otherwise.
TestPullRead.title: TestPullRead

YieldCurveViewRead.description: One currency's authoritative curve; rates are decimal fractions.
YieldCurveViewRead.title: YieldCurveViewRead
